name: hype_v1
description: High-energy, fast-paced sizzle optimized for high retention and excitement.

sequence.prompt: Cinematic high-energy hook for {actor_name} in {title_text}. Dramatic text overlay: '{actor_name} DEEP CUT'. Powerful trailer voice: 'You won't believe where {actor_name} started.'

sequence.guidance: A second distinct scene featuring {actor_name} in a key moment

sequence.prompt: Fast-paced high-impact outro for {title_text}. Vibrant text: 'WATCH NOW'. Professional VO: 'Catch the full episode of {title_text} only on our platform. Link in bio!'
